Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Duster]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Duster is the name of Calder's gunner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Duster is the false name used by Dalton Foster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Duster is a member of the crew of The Testament.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Duster is an old man with a wild mane of gray hair and a nest of a beard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Duster is a former gunsmith and a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Duster is a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Duster is over seventy years old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Duster is an old gunsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Duster is the Vessel of a Soulbound craftsman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Duster is a character who uses fire against an Inquisitor.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
